# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for VPC network with subnets for our three-tier application. Use auto-create subnets mode for simplicity so GCP creates subnet ranges automatically. This speeds up deployment without manual IP planning.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
  - name: "projects/mygcpproject"
    type: cloud-functions.googleapis.com/v1betaCloudFunction
    properties:
      template: |+
        {
          "type": "cloud-functions",
          "runtime": "nodejs8", // you can choose any runtime here, e.g., 'python', or your preferred language's SDK package name (e.g.: `google`)  if it supports function deployment templates with Cloud Functions as described in the [docs](https://cloud.google.com/deployment-manager/docs/#create_and_deploy_resources).
          "entryPoint": "myFunction", // replace this to match your actual serverless cloud functions entrypoint e.g., 'index' if you have an index file in the root directory of each function as described below: https://cloud.google.com/serverless/docs#choosing_your_runtime
          ...function-configs//...  // include all configurations for your specific Cloud Function here, use a yaml extension to list like 'list', e.g., functions: - myFunction1   : function2    : thirdFn etc.. You can also do multiline strings with fences as follows `"""multi line string""",`
        }
